prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-ASRO-5PCGEMKIT-TIGER-BUN Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 1lb Rough Genuine Gemstone Mineral Paydirt Sifting Dig Kit, 5pc (Many Styles) Description: Embark on an exciting adventure with the ASR Outdoor 5pc Gemstone Mining Kit! This all-in-one kit includes everything you need to dig, sift, and discover beautiful gemstones in your very own paydirt. Whether you're a seasoned prospector or a beginner, this kit is perfect for bringing the thrill of gemstone discovery right to your fingertips.

With 1lb of carefully curated gemstone material, you’ll enjoy hours of excitement as you sift, clean, and polish your own gems. The durable 9.75” x 9.75” plastic sand sifter with 36 holes per square inch is ideal for separating gemstones from paydirt. Its convenient handles and weather-resistant design ensure you can sift through your findings in any outdoor condition.

To make your discovery even easier, the kit includes a trowel, brush, and magnifying tweezers - perfect for collecting, cleaning, and studying your precious finds. These essential tools are designed for gemstone enthusiasts, hobbyists, or anyone looking to experience the thrill of prospecting.

The 5pc Gemstone Mineral Dig Kit comes complete with 1lb of gemstone material, a sifting sieve, a trowel, a brush, and tweezers, offering you everything you need to get started. Whether you’re exploring the great outdoors or just enjoying a hands-on project at home, this kit makes gemstone prospecting fun and easy. Get ready to dig, sift, and discover your next treasure with this perfect set for outdoor adventurers and aspiring gem hunters! Search Terms: geology; gemstone dig kit; minerals; fossils; paleontology; archeology; mining science kits; crystals and stones; rockhounding tools; amethyst; pyrite; crystal; mining tools Features: - 5PC GEMSTONE PAYDIRT DIG KIT - This ASR Outdoor Gemstone Mining Kit comes with essential items to enjoy the thrill of sifting through paydirt and identifying precious minerals: 1x 1-pound bag of rough gemstone paydirt, a plastic sieve, a trowel, a brush, and magnifying glass tweezers. - DIVERSE PAYDIRT EXPERIENCE - Featuring 1lb of carefully curated material, this bag of gemstones provides a fun and rewarding mineral sifting experience. Discover, clean, and polish your very own gemstones out in the field! - PLASTIC SAND SIFTER - The kit comes with a 9.75” x 9.75” classifying sieve ideal for sifting through your gemstones and paydirt. The sieve has 36 holes per square inch, comes with convenient handles, and is made of durable plastic designed for use in any weather. - COLLECTION ACCESSORIES - We’ve also added a durable plastic trowel, a brush, and magnifying tweezers for collecting, cleaning, and studying your findings. Accessories are ideal fine mineral recovery tools for prospecting enthusiasts. - SPECIFICATIONS - Gemstone bag size: 1lb; Collection tool materials: plastic, metal, glass; Number of pieces included: 5; Colors: assorted === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 1lb Gemstone Mining Dig Kit 5pc

anthropic.title_differentiation: 5 Piece Set, Sifter And Tools Included, Rough Gemstones, Paydirt Prospecting, Perfect For Beginners
